title: Error during Docker Run: exec user process caused "exec format error"
body:
**Description**
I got an error trying to run docker image on a Raspberry Pi 3 with Rasbian (Linux raspberrypi 4.9.59-v7+) with command:
`sudo docker run -it -p 3303:3303 flogo/flogo-docker:latest eula-accept`

error returned is:
`standard_init_linux.go:207: exec user process caused "exec format error"`

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**
1. install docker: curl `-sSL https://get.docker.com | sh`
2. run latest flogo docker image: `sudo docker run -it -p 3303:3303 flogo/flogo-docker:latest eula-accept`

**Describe the results you received:**
error returned is:
`standard_init_linux.go:207: exec user process caused "exec format error"`

**Describe the results you expected:**
I expect I can run flogo image

**Output of `rpm -q buildah` or `apt list buildah`:**
```
pi@raspberrypi:~ $ apt list buildah
Listing... Done
```

**Output of `buildah version`:**

```
(paste your output here)
```

**Output of `podman version` if reporting a `podman build` issue:**

```
(paste your output here)
```

**Output of `cat /etc/*release`:**

```
pi@raspberrypi:~ $ cat /etc/*release
PRETTY_NAME="Raspbian GNU/Linux 9 (stretch)"
NAME="Raspbian GNU/Linux"
VERSION_ID="9"
VERSION="9 (stretch)"
ID=raspbian
ID_LIKE=debian
HOME_URL="http://www.raspbian.org/"
SUPPORT_URL="http://www.raspbian.org/RaspbianForums"
BUG_REPORT_URL="http://www.raspbian.org/RaspbianBugs"
```

**Output of `uname -a`:**
```Linux raspberrypi 4.9.59-v7+ #1047 SMP Sun Oct 29 12:19:23 GMT 2017 armv7l GNU/Linux```

**Output of `cat /etc/containers/storage.conf`:**

```
(paste your output here)
```
